Readings

Week Topic Readings
Week 1 01/03/22 Mon, 01/03 Introduction
01/05/22 Wed, 01/05 Intro to Hardware and Software
  1. Charles Severance Ch1: Intro to Computing. Python for Everybody
    reading • video
01/07/22 Fri, 01/07 Writing Programs
  1. Charles Severance Ch1: Intro to Computing. Python for Everybody
    reading • video
  2. Charles Severance Ch2: Variables. Python for Everybody
Week 2 01/10/22 Mon, 01/10 Variables & Functions
  1. Charles Severance Ch1: Intro to Computing. Python for Everybody
    reading • video
  2. Charles Severance Ch2: Variables. Python for Everybody
01/12/22 Wed, 01/12 Lists & Tuples
  1. Severance Ch9: Lists.
    reading • video
  2. Severance Ch10: Tuples.
    reading • video
01/14/22 Fri, 01/14 Zooming in on Functions
Week 3 01/19/22 Wed, 01/19 Creating Your Own Functions
01/21/22 Fri, 01/21 Defining Functions and Abstraction
Week 4 01/24/22 Mon, 01/24 Modules, Scope & Review
  1. Heinold Ch12: Modules.
    Skim sections 12.1 through 12.4.
01/26/22 Wed, 01/26 Review: Week 3
01/28/22 Fri, 01/28 Quiz 1
Week 5 01/31/22 Mon, 01/31 Conditional Execution & Boolean Logic
  1. Severance Ch3: Conditionals.
    reading • video
  2. Ch5: Conditionals. ThinkCS
02/02/22 Wed, 02/02 While Loops
  1. Severance Ch5: Iteration.
    reading • video
  2. Ch7: Iteration. ThinkCS
02/04/22 Fri, 02/04 More Practice: While Loops & If Statements
Week 6 02/07/22 Mon, 02/07 More Loops
02/09/22 Wed, 02/09 More Practice with For Loops & Sequences
02/11/22 Fri, 02/11 User Inputs & Events
Week 7 02/14/22 Mon, 02/14 Working with the Terminal / Command Prompt
02/16/22 Wed, 02/16 Quiz 2
02/18/22 Fri, 02/18 Files and Strings
  1. Severance Ch6: Strings.
    reading • video
  2. Severance Ch7: Files.
    reading • video

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.

Special thanks to Prof. Sarah Van Wart who first developed this curriculum.
